headline: Shares of oil and gas-related companies are trading higher as crude prices jump amid uncertainty over whether the U.S. and Iran will hold peace talks before the ceasefire expires on April 22, raising the risk of renewed conflict.
summary: Shares of oil and gas-related companies are trading higher as crude prices jump amid uncertainty over whether the U.S. and Iran will hold peace talks before the ceasefire expires on April 22, raising the risk of renewed conflict.
